_meta.methodology: BUILD_PROCESS master loop (brain -> skills 08 Security -> implement -> unit -> verify)
_meta.scope: P0.4 from reports/SPEC_VS_BUILT_GAP.md — dashboard count scoping (RLS-bypass fix)

title: P0.4 — dashboard counts honour assignment scope (fix non-admin global-total leak)
business_reason: company_dashboard computed KPI counts with the service-role admin client and NO scope filter, so a non-admin staff saw GLOBAL totals across every table (RLS bypass; violates assigned_scope_filter_required_for_non_admin_roles). The role filter only chose WHICH tiles, never scoped the counts.
brain_skills: Brain: a user must only see what they're scoped to. Skills: 08 Security (A01 IDOR / least privilege), 05 API Contract.

param_14.question: Scope dashboard counts to the actor's assignment dimensions.
param_14.answer: countOf now applies applicableFilters(actor, table) — the SAME (column, values) scope filters the kernel list uses — via .in(). getStaffKpis takes the Actor (not just roles[]). Global actors get [] (unrestricted); school/region/olympiad/queue-scoped actors get .in(school_id|state|olympiad_id|queue_name, [values]). The dashboard now matches exactly what the actor can list.
param_14.security_implications: Closes a non-admin global-total information leak; consistent with list scoping.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: Role over-grants (certificates `public` read; security_audit_console support_manager read/write; notification_ops coordinator/support write) are a SEPARATE permissions-spec fix — tracked as P0.4b.
param_14.assumptions: applicableFilters is the source of truth for scope (already used by the kernel list).

principles_pass.P0.6: reuses the kernel scope helper — dashboard scope == list scope, one source of truth
principles_pass.P3.8: least privilege; global actors unrestricted, scoped actors filtered
principles_pass.P0.7: fixes an existing security defect, no debt left

functional: global actor: no scope .in filters; school-scoped: .in(school_id,[S1]); region-scoped: .in(state,[north]) (unit dashboard_scope 3/3)
security_owasp: A01: non-admin can no longer read global totals via the dashboard

verification: tsc clean; unit dashboard_scope 3/3 (159 total); existing dashboard e2e (01_dashboard) green.

known_followups.P0.4b_role_overgrants: edit permissions.json for certificates (drop public read), security_audit_console (drop support_manager), notification_ops (drop coordinator/support write) and regenerate.
